narrative:
Rome Township (precinct in Athens County) has 796 registered voters, with 53.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 28.0%, a clear Democratic lean of 9.8 percentage points.
